prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda **BP-ZE (RS)** 1.8L DOHC 16V (BP engine code) with a **Toda Racing 87mm stroker crankshaft**, **Toda forged pistons (11.5:1 compression)**, and **Toda billet connecting rods** for a 2.0L displacement, paired with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** on a **custom tubular manifold** and **HKS GT-SS wastegate** for 300whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** and **ID1000x injectors**.

Full **Cusco Type-RS 4-point bolt-in roll cage** with **Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD** and **OS Giken Super Lock differential** for the **Mazda G-platform rear subframe**, reinforced with **Hardrace adjustable toe arms** and **Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm)** for chassis rigidity.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Mazda MX-5 NB-specific valving)**, **Tein EDFC Active Pro ride height controller**, **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)**, and **D2 Racing 320mm 4-piston front brake kit** with **Project Mu 999.9 pads** and **Motul RBF660 brake fluid**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 AZ-3 widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders**, **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style latches)**, and **Veilside Fortune rear bumper** with **custom dual-exit exhaust cutouts** for a **3.5-inch HKS Hi-Power exhaust**.

**Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +38 wheels** with **Yokohama Advan A052 tires (225/45/15)** and **custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive flush fitment, paired with **Mazdaspeed MX-5 NB rear wing (carbon fiber)** on **custom aluminum mounts**.

**Full interior strip-out** with **Bride Zeta III bucket seats (AZ-3-specific mounts)**, **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** mounted on a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**.
